sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 46 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.24 & 25. 2. For orders on CMA No.59/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 04.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Per learned counsel, the matter pertains to factual controversy which is not amenable for adjudication in reference jurisdiction. He states that identical matters have already been dismissed by this court for the same reasons, therefore, this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
